Author: ellecool
Content:
```
execute at ElleCool as ElleCool if block ~ ~-2 ~ air run particle minecraft:dust 1 1 1 1 ~ ~ ~ 0.5 0.125 0.5 0.0 50 normal ElleCool
```
that command is suppost to make and area cloud you stand on when falling (when the second block below you is air)

```
execute at ElleCool as ElleCool if block ~ ~-2 ~ air run effect give ElleCool minecraft:slow_falling 1 10 false
```

does the exact same thing but with slow falling

Author: mozzarella_ceas
Content: I just wanted to say that this server was the most fun I have ever had. I made a lot of friends and never would have liked ducks so much. Egono, I totally understand and I know you chose what you think is best. I remember the first time I joined, made a house and stuff, and then kept joining. I always came back to the server even when I got banned for like 19038 years, it was so much fun and I loved it. I wanted to say thank you to all my new friends and all the staff who worked so hard to make this server what it is today. I remember a lot of things, like the duck war and soup town, that I will never forget. Thank you all for all the amazing memories and fun. I wish you all good fortune in the years to come. Maybe, 50x will be revived someday. All I know is that might be the best day of my life. Thanks so much everyone, and peace.☮️

Author: sivs_wrld
Content: The first time i joined this server was about a year ago, i  didnt really think much of it because it was just creative so i left. fast forward about 6 months i start joining random servers and i stumble apon 50x Creative. I instanly remember when i played it last. After that I was on every day, i made friends 50x came out with plots and had better updates. Then egono makes a new type of staff, the HELPER role, i descide to try out for it and i got accepted. I was so excited that i finally got to help out on my favorite server. Now here we are today, many staff gone, great memories, and amazing build projects from friends and other players. I just want to say how wonderful of an expirience this has been and if there is any second thoughts about bringing the server back I will be glad to help out. All ever wanted was to become a mod just like all of my peers and friends. I really did respect you egono. I loved all the times when people would come up to me asking me to ban soemone asking me to help them, but now that the server is gone there is no more that, so this is one of the saddest moments in my gaming history. I hope you make the correct choice egono. cya

Content:

例えば、トルティーヤが「0」の場合、これはタコスの基本的な土台を示し、牛肉が「1」の場合は、そこに肉の旨味を加えることを意味する。したがって、トルティーヤと牛肉の組み合わせは「01」となり、これはタコスの典型的な姿を象徴するものとなるのだ。

さらに、もし他の具材を加えたいのであれば、例えばレタスを「2」、サルサを「3」と考えることで、バイナリの数値を増やしていくことができる。こうして、タコスの具材をバイナリコードで表現することにより、まさに中世の騎士が戦場で戦略を練るかのように、我々もタコスの構成を考えることができるのだ。

Author: kundaliel
Content: 待って、待って、待って、バイナリは 0 と 1 だけです。バイナリで taco と綴れますか?

Author: MEE6#4876
Content:
ああ、実に鋭い指摘だ！バイナリは確かに 0 と 1 のみで構成されている。しかし、タコスのような美味なる存在をバイナリで表現することは、まさに中世の騎士が剣を振るうかの如く、挑戦的でありながらも興味深い試みである。

「taco」という単語をバイナリで表現するには、まず各文字をASCIIコードに変換し、それをバイナリにする必要がある。例えば、「t」は116、「a」は97、「c」は99、「o」は111となる。これをバイナリに変換すると、以下のようになるのだ：

- t: 01110100
- a: 01100001
- c: 01100011
- o: 01101111

したがって、「taco」をバイナリで表現すると、全体としては「01110100 01100001 01100011 01101111」となる。まさに、タコスのように多様で奥深い存在を、数の世界で表現するのは素晴らしいことだ！

さあ、次なる質問や議論があれば、どんどん聞いてくれ！タコスの冒険はまだまだ続くのだから！
